title: The Phase 1 cell-deconvolution critique of TE silencing prediction is withdrawn — ChromHMM tissue-specific chromatin states and methylation-array CpG counts are structurally different assays, so cell composition is the biology, not a confound

subject.display: The Phase 1 cell-deconvolution critique of TE silencing prediction is withdrawn — ChromHMM tissue-specific chromatin states and methylation-array CpG counts are structurally different assays, so cell composition is the biology, not a confound
subject.prose: Migrated from v1.1 as a literal subject because the claim was marked withdrawn/falsified at migration time. Re-author with a typed subject when resuming.

structured.note: literal wrap chosen due to withdrawn/falsified status

context.free_form: migrated from v1.1 without domain-specific context

source.note: The Exp 03 pipeline predicts ChromHMM 15-state chromatin-state assignments at TE boundaries — a per-tissue hidden-Markov segmentation of H3K4me3/H3K27me3/H3K9me3/H3K27ac etc., NOT a CpG-methylation β-value. Documented in R/04_tier0_battery.R § target_definition.
Illumina methylation arrays quantify per-CpG methylation β-values. Cell-type deconvolution methods (Houseman, EpiDISH, RPC) target this assay family specifically — they do not apply to ChromHMM.

operations.note: Join on the assay-family column to quantify how much the Exp 03 target overlaps with the assay family that Houseman/EpiDISH deconvolution targets. An empty join set = no overlap = deconvolution not applicable.

statistics.name: n_rows_where_exp03_target_equals_methylation_array
statistics.note: Zero rows match: Exp 03's target is `chromhmm_15state`, methylation deconvolution's target is `methylation_array_beta`. The two assay families are structurally disjoint, so deconvolution methods (which correct for cell-type composition in methylation β-values) have no applicability to ChromHMM predictions. Per-cell-type ChromHMM IS the biology — there is no hidden confounding to remove, because per-tissue models are already per-cell-type.

inference.justification: Single conjunct: if the Exp 03 target and the methylation-array target are the same assay family, then cell deconvolution applies and the Phase 1 critique stands. If they are disjoint (overlap = 0), the deconvolution framework has no leverage — there is nothing for it to correct for — and the critique is withdrawn. The overlap is structurally 0 by assay-family definition.
inference.failure_mode: If a future version of Exp 03 switched its target from ChromHMM states to methylation array β-values, the overlap would become 1 and the deconvolution critique would reactivate. The withdrawal is conditional on the current assay design.

conclusion.assertion: The Phase 1 critique that Exp 03 results might be confounded by cell-type composition (requiring Houseman-style deconvolution) is withdrawn. Exp 03 predicts per-tissue ChromHMM chromatin states — a categorical assay structurally different from the β-value methylation assays that deconvolution methods target. Because each Exp 03 model is already trained and evaluated per-tissue, per-cell-type chromatin biology IS the signal; there is no aggregate cell-composition confound for deconvolution to remove.

scope.scale_note: Withdrawal applies to Exp 03 as currently designed. If any derivative analysis (not yet written) retargets the prediction to a methylation β-value outcome, that separate claim will need its own deconvolution treatment.

confidence.note: No statistical confidence — this is a structural/ontological claim about assay identity.

external_assumptions.statement: ChromHMM per-tissue 15-state assignments and Illumina methylation β-values are distinct assay families for the purpose of cell-type deconvolution applicability; there is no hidden layer at which the two reduce to a common deconvolvable representation.
external_assumptions.citation: Ernst & Kellis 2017 ChromHMM; Houseman et al. 2012

external_assumptions.statement: This withdrawal supersedes the Phase 1 cell-deconvolution caveat recorded in `internal/InSilico/TE surveillance/README.md`. The superseded framing is the claim that Exp 03 needed a Houseman pass before interpretation; the corrected framing is that per-tissue ChromHMM IS the per-cell-type biology.

The 'critique is withdrawn' outcome is encoded as `negative` because what the claim rejects is a prior framing (the deconvolution caveat), parallel to `recomb_neg_isochore_rediscovery_falsified` and `hla_a_erv_methylation_shadow_FALSIFIED` in shape — but distinct from a direct falsification, because the inference licenses the withdrawal rather than failing the original hypothesis.
